## Description
Please include a summary of the change and which issue it fixes. Please also include relevant motivation and context.

Fixes # (issue reference number)

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Refactoring (performance, code cleanup, style, etc.)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist:
- [ ] My code follows the code style guidelines of this project.
- [ ] I have cleaned up unused imports, variables, and console log statements.
- [ ] I have verified that `npm run build` completes successfully without any TypeScript or bundling compiler errors.
- [ ] My changes do not introduce security risks or hardcoded credentials/tokens.
- [ ] I have manually tested the extension's behavior in Chrome.
